caption: A screen recording shows a software interface for log analysis, likely a monitoring tool. The dark-themed application displays an "Explore" section with a query bar containing the text `Log labels = {"Fluent-Fluent-01*"}`. Below this is a timeline of activity with vertical markers and a detailed list of log entries. Each log entry contains timestamps, such as `2020-08-28 00:22:37`, and technical strings including "top" and "Fluent-Fluent-01". A small video inset in the top right corner shows a man with short dark hair wearing a white shirt. Throughout the sequence, the screen remains static, showing the same log data and the man in the inset. The top of the window indicates a browser tab labeled "Activities Google Chrome" and a system clock reading "Oct 28 00:22". No actions or changes occur between the sampled moments.
